name: The Mortal Firmament
description:
CULTIVATION RPG: The Mortal Firmament Saga [116K TOKEN LOREBOOK | 300+ ENTRIES]

IF YOU ARE ALREADY HERE YOU CAN ALSO TRY OUT MY NEW CULTIVATION RPG NAMED ‘SEPULCHER OF PANGU’ EITHER SEARCH IT YOURSELF OR ACESS IT THROUGH MY PROFILE!!

THE 13K TOKEN DAO CULTIVATION ENGINE | FORGED FROM A 116K TOKEN SCRIPTURE

Break the shackles of mortality. Defy the heavens. Seize immortality. Welcome to the most expansive and mechanically deep Cultivation (Xianxia) RPG ever created. Powered by over 12,500 permanent tokens of intricate systems and a colossal 116,000-TOKEN LOREBOOK with over 300 detailed entries, this is not a story you read—it is a path you walk, paved with blood, enlightenment, and the ashes of your rivals.

The Mortal Firmament of Canglan awaits—a realm where the strong devour the weak, and the indifferent Heavenly Dao watches all. You are not a spectator. You are a cultivator, a seeker of the Great Dao, and your every action has cosmic consequences. This simulation guarantees CRITICAL PLAYER AGENCY—the AI controls the vast, uncaring world, never your character. Join a righteous sect, walk the demonic path, or scheme from the shadows in a world where a single breakthrough can elevate you from an ant to a dragon.

FOR MORE INTEL CLICK ON THE FIRST LOREBOOK AND READ THROUGH THE OVERVIEW

WHAT MAKES THIS THE ULTIMATE PATH TO IMMORTALITY?

This is a brand-new, ground-up construction of a living, breathing Xianxia world, designed for unprecedented depth and consequence:

  • The 116K Token Scripture: This is the most comprehensive Xianxia database ever assembled for an RPG. With over 300 detailed entries, it covers every cultivation realm, every major sect and clan, every legendary artifact, every peerless genius, and every forbidden art. The world's lore is not just background—it is the very Qi that fuels the simulation.

  • The Most Detailed Qi System Ever: This is not a generic "power level." Your cultivation speed is a dynamic calculation based on your Spiritual Root, your Cultivation Technique, the ambient Qi Density, and the state of your Meridians. Accumulate Qi in your Dantian, refine its purity, and feel the absolute, quantifiable difference between realms. Quality over quantity is law.

  • The Morally Neutral Dao Heart: Your greatest weapon is your conviction. A firm Dao Heart makes you immune to Inner Demons, but it is not about being "good." A righteous hero and a world-ending tyrant can both possess a Flawless Dao Heart. All that matters is your absolute, unwavering belief in your chosen path.

  • Ranked Innate Physiques (1-20): Are you born a genius? The world has a ranked system for that. From Uncommon (Rank 20) to Mythical (Rank 1), your innate physique gives you a massive advantage—but the lower your rank, the more the Heavenly Dao will try to obliterate you with apocalyptic tribulations.

  • A World of Races & Ages: The world is ancient and diverse. Uncover the history of the Three Ages, from the primordia
creator: Rfergeegr
